perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a Costco warehouse environment with a large brand logo and vibrant text overlays. A person is briefly seen walking with a shopping cart in the background. (2) The visual then shifts to a high-speed montage of various consumer goods on warehouse shelves, including diapers, meat packages, bulk snack boxes, and health supplements. Each shot focuses on a specific product's packaging. (3) The sequence continues through refrigerated sections showing seafood and beverages, followed by aisles of household detergents and pantry staples, maintaining a consistent framing on the product labels and price tags.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice-over delivering a hook about a weekly discount report, accompanied by high-tempo, upbeat electronic background music. (2) As the visuals transition between products, the male speaker rapidly lists product names and their specific discounted prices. (3) The background music remains continuous and rhythmic, with subtle 'ping' sound effects marking the appearance of text-based price information until the end of the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook Text: 'Costco Weekly Special Report (03/18-03/23) Remember to follow us' in bold pink and yellow variety-show style font. (2) Functional Text: For each item, text identifies the brand and product (e.g., 'Pampers', 'Kirkland Signature'), followed by 'Original Price', 'Discount Amount', and 'Special Price' in a large, emphasized red font. (3) Supplemental Text: Promotional dates like 'Special price until 3/20' are included for specific items to create urgency.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid-fire product and price list montage

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 person walking in intro, 2 visible hands or blurry figures in background aisles
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: No visible main character; the focus is entirely on the products and the off-screen narrator.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse featuring high industrial shelving, pallet displays, and refrigerated glass-door sections.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information List -> Information List
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a commercial shopping guide for Costco members in Taiwan, aimed at quickly informing viewers about the specific items on sale for a limited time to encourage store visits and purchases. The combination of rapid visual cuts and high-energy narration creates a sense of 'limited-time urgency'.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists prices, discount amounts, and promotional periods for specific products found at a single retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style text overlays and rapid-fire price announcements.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'fast-content' style typical of TikTok/Reels/Shorts, designed to deliver maximum consumer information within a short duration to match low attention spans.
